message:
fix: Saturating arithmetic in traceback coordinate calculations

- traceback.rs: Use saturating_add for max_y (area.y + area.height)
  to prevent u16 overflow
- traceback.rs: Use saturating_add for cell_x in draw_line and
  draw_line_partial to prevent u16 overflow with wide text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
